caliber.b_semantics: full replication (E1F replicated caliber): identical 1 sequences on all 4 TP ranks; MoE gathers 4 rows
caliber.input: the stage input residual buffer is filled once with a deterministic bf16 tensor and held constant; no transport runs inside the timed window
caliber.kv: seeded decode residency at position 2048 (deterministic-seeded-KV-not-real-prefix, E1a27); max_seq_len=3328; kv_dtype=bf16
caliber.timing: round A: host wall around replay + torch.cuda.synchronize. round B: same wall, plus in-graph external CUDA event nodes read back after the synchronize (outside the timed window)
caliber.topology: single node, TP4 only, one super-stage over layers 0-10; no PP handoff, no embed/head; the graph replay is the whole measured object
